mandatory_policy: Mirror does not repair rejected packets.
Mirror does not infer missing Campaign Physics values.
Only packets passing contract validation can become Mirror input.
All REJECT, HOLD, and WARNING events must emit audit logs.

rules.reason: Mirror must not run for this packet.

rules.condition: Field value type does not match contract.
rules.reason: Reject and alert because packet is structurally unsafe.

rules.condition: Field value violates enum, range, or pattern.
rules.reason: Skip packet and record the invalid field.

rules.condition: Packet schema_version does not equal accepted contract version.
rules.reason: Wait for compatible version or migration decision.

rules.condition: Packet includes a field not defined by contract.
rules.reason: Continue if all required known fields are valid.

rules.condition: Packet is structurally valid but contains nullable unresolved physics values.
rules.reason: Wait until required Campaign Physics values are complete.

rules.condition: All required fields are present and valid.
rules.reason: Allow packet as Mirror Pattern input.
